summary: Fair‑sound mono soundboard captures a strong set highlighted by Bird Song and a thoughtful Dark Star>Dew.
review: The performance is praised for its tight first‑set numbers—Promised Land, Sugaree, Me & My Uncle—and especially the soaring Bird Songs of late ’72, with Dark Star>Dew noted as a highlight. The recording sounds mono and a bit less crisp than other sources, but it still conveys the energy of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is strong with multiple standout songs; recording is only fair due to mono sound and reduced clarity, leading to a solid overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mono‑sounding mix, less crisp than other versions; no major dropouts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set strong with classic cuts; second half features phenomenal Bird Songs, maintaining momentum without any noted lulls.
